# Graxia OS & Obsidian Master Cleanup Plan
> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Enterprise-grade cleanup, removing all dead code, fixing specific UI/Scraping bugs, and hardening production. No fake data.
**Architecture:** Multi-agent orchestration, FastAPI, React, Supabase.
**Tech Stack:** Python, TypeScript, Redis, PostgreSQL.

---

### Task 2: Facebook Scraping Optimization (10 Groups & Strict Filters)
**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/app/agents/social/facebook_agent.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Limit to 10 Target Groups**
```python
TARGET_GROUPS = [
  'https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1LVFMct7hR/',
  'https://www.facebook.com/share/g/18SE6B254K/',
  'https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1DLXSAT8W7/',
  'https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1CrX8Zp8xb/',
  'https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1B8mjvuG4Q/',
  'https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1HhAToUqQW/',
  # Add remaining
]
```
- [ ] **Step 2: Two-Condition Keyword Filter & Contact Check**
```python
# Cond 1: Owner post, เจ้าของปล่อยเช่า, รับเอเจ้น, Accept Agent, etc.
# Cond 2: เช่า OR Rent
# Filter: Must include Phone number or LINE ID, drop duplicates.
```
- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**
```bash
git add backend/app/agents/social/facebook_agent.py
git commit -m "feat(facebook): optimize scraping logic with strict conditions"
```
